verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Lord is my Shepherd, I shall not want, He maketh me down to lie In pastures green, He leadeth me The quiet waters by.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: His yoke is easy, His burden is light, I've found it so, I've found it so; He leadeth me By day and by night, Where living waters flow.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My soul crieth out: "Restore me again, And give me The strength to take The narrow path of righteousness, E'en for Thine own name's sake."

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yea, though I should walk The valley of death, Yet what should I fear from ill? For Thou art with me and Thy rod and staff support me still.
